---
title: "BulSU Graduate Employment Dashboard"
output: 
  flexdashboard::flex_dashboard:
    orientation: rows
    vertical_layout: fill
    self_contained: TRUE
    theme: lumen
    css: ILOVEBULSU.css
---

```{r setup, include = F}

knitr::opts_chunk$set(warning    = F,
                      message    = F,
                      echo       = F)

library(flexdashboard)
library(tidyverse)
library(plotly)
library(DT)
library(survival)
library(broom)

source("Analysis.R")



# ---- Formats ----

## Pie charts

pie_plotly <- function(df, category_col) {
  
  df <- df[order(df$count, decreasing = TRUE), ]
  df[[category_col]] <- factor(df[[category_col]], levels = df[[category_col]])
  
  plot_ly(
    data         = df,
    labels       = ~.data[[category_col]],
    values       = ~count,
    type         = "pie",
    text = ~ifelse(count / sum(count) * 100 < 5, "", paste0(count, "<br>",
                                                            round(count / sum(count) * 100, 0), "%")),
    textinfo     = "text",
    textposition = "inside",
    direction    = "clockwise",
    rotation     = 0,
    marker       = list(colors = c("#4682B4", "#FF7F50", "#2E8B57",
                                   "#B22222", "#9370DB", "#7F7F7F")),
    hoverinfo    = "text",
    hovertext    = ~paste(.data[[category_col]], "<br>Count:", count)
  ) |>
    layout(
      showlegend = TRUE,
      legend = list(
        orientation = "v",
        x = 1.05, y = 0.5,
        xanchor = "left", yanchor = "middle"
      )
    ) |> config(displayModeBar = FALSE)
}



# ---- Coefficients ----

## Cox

coxBestAlt$estimate

cox_Age    <- -0.25
cox_Sex_F  <- -0.26
cox_BSES   <-  0.34
cox_BSFT   <-  0.68
cox_BSM_AS <-  0.25
cox_BSM_BA <-  0.47
cox_BSM_CS <-  0.09
cox_Year   <- -0.18
cox_Exams  <- -0.20

## AFT

aftBestAlt$estimate

aft_Inter  <-  1.86
aft_Age    <-  0.35
aft_Sex_F  <-  0.35
aft_BSES   <- -0.48
aft_BSFT   <- -0.90
aft_BSM_AS <- -0.33
aft_BSM_BA <- -0.68
aft_BSM_CS <- -0.12
aft_Year   <-  0.21
aft_Exams  <-  0.27
aft_Log    <-  0.30

# RPS

rpsBestAlt$term

rps_Inter  <- -3.10
rps_Age    <- -0.26
rps_Sex_F  <- -0.26
rps_BSES   <-  0.36
rps_BSFT   <-  0.67
rps_BSM_AS <-  0.24
rps_BSM_BA <-  0.50
rps_BSM_CS <-  0.09
rps_Year   <- -0.16
rps_Exams  <- -0.20
rps_Log    <-  6.68

```


# Demographic Profiles

Row {.tabset .tabset-fade}
-------------------------------------

### Age

```{r}

age <- ggplot(tibbleList$Age,
              aes(x    = Age,
                  y    = count,
                  text = paste0(round(count / sum(count) * 100, 0),
                                "%"))) +
  geom_col(fill  = "#4682B4",
           width = 1) +
  labs(y = "Count") + 
  theme_minimal()

ggplotly(age)

```

### Sex

```{r}

pie_plotly(tibbleList$Sex, "Sex")

```



# Academic Profiles

Row {.tabset .tabset-fade}
-------------------------------------

### Undergraduate Program
    
```{r}

ugp <- ggplot(tibbleList$`Undergraduate program`,
              aes(x    = `Undergraduate program`,
                  y    = count,
                  text = paste0(round(count / sum(count) * 100, 0),
                                "%"))) +
  geom_col(fill = "#4682B4") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(y = "Count") + 
  theme_minimal()

ggplotly(ugp)

```

### Program Preference

```{r}

pie_plotly(tibbleList$`Program preference`, "Program preference")

```

### Graduation Year

```{r}

gy <- ggplot(tibbleList$`Graduation year`,
              aes(x    = `Graduation year`,
                  y    = count,
                  text = paste0(round(count / sum(count) * 100, 0), "%"))) +
  geom_col(fill  = "#4682B4",
           width = 1) +
  labs(y = "Count") + 
  theme_minimal()

ggplotly(gy)

```

### Postgraduate Education

```{r}

pie_plotly(tibbleList$`Postgraduate education`, "Postgraduate education")

```

### Professional Exams

```{r}

pfe <- ggplot(tibbleList$`Professional exams`,
              aes(x    = `Professional exams`,
                  y    = count,
                  text = paste0(round(count / sum(count) * 100, 0), "%"))) +
  geom_col(fill  = "#4682B4",
           width = 1) +
  labs(y = "Count") + 
  theme_minimal()

ggplotly(pfe)

```



# Professional Profiles

Row {.tabset .tabset-fade}
-------------------------------------

### Employment Status

```{r}

pie_plotly(tibbleList$`Status string`, "Status string")

```

### Nature of Employment

```{r}

pie_plotly(tibbleList$`Nature of employment`, "Nature of employment")

```

### Sector of Employment

```{r}

soe <- ggplot(tibbleList$`Sector of employment`,
              aes(x    = reorder(`Sector of employment`, -count),
                  y    = count,
                  text = paste0(round(count / sum(count) * 100, 0), "%"))) +
  geom_col(fill  = "#4682B4",
           width = 1) +
  labs(x = "Sector of employment",
       y = "Count") + 
  theme_minimal()

ggplotly(soe)

```

### Employment Qualification

```{r}

pie_plotly(tibbleList$`Employment qualification`, "Employment qualification")

```

### Employment Wait Time

```{r}

ewt <- ggplot(survey, aes(x = `Employment wait time`)) + 
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 4,
                 fill     = "#4682B4") +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-4, 52), breaks = seq(0, 52, 4)) + 
  labs(x = "Employment wait time (weeks)",
       y = "Count") + 
  theme_minimal()

ggplotly(ewt)

```



# Survival Method 1

Row {.tabset .tabset-fade}
-------------------------------------

### Kaplan–Meier Curves Across Different Categorical Variables

```{r}

# ---- Variables ----

my_colors <- c("#4682B4", "#FF7F50", "#2E8B57",
               "#B22222", "#9370DB", "#7F7F7F")

names(survey) <- make.names(names(survey))

kmVars <- c("Sex",
            "Undergraduate.program",
            "Program.preference",
            "Postgraduate.education") 

kmVars_full <- c("All", kmVars)

# ---- Plotly ----

curvs <- plot_ly()

trace_map <- list()
trace_count <- 0

# ---- Generate curvs ----

for (strat in kmVars_full) {
  
  if (strat == "All") {
    
    kmFit <- survfit(Surv(Employment.wait.time,
                          Status) ~ 1,
                     data = survey)
    
    df <- broom::tidy(kmFit)
    df$strata <- "All"
    
    } else {
      
      kmFit <- survfit(reformulate(strat,
                                   response = "Surv(Employment.wait.time, Status)"),
                       data = survey)
      
      df <- broom::tidy(kmFit)
      df$strata <- gsub(".*=", "", df$strata)
      
      if (is.null(df$strata)) {
        
        df$strata <- strat
        
        }
      }
  
  strata_levels <- unique(df$strata)
  trace_map[[strat]] <- c()
  
  color_index <- 0
  
  for (s in strata_levels) {
    
    trace_count <- trace_count + 1
    color_index <- color_index + 1
    
    df_sub <- df |>
      filter(strata == s)
    
    curvs <- curvs |>
      add_lines(data    = df_sub,
                x       = ~time,
                y       = ~estimate,
                name    = s,
                visible = (strat == kmVars_full[1]),
                line    = list(shape = "hv",
                               color = my_colors[color_index]))
    
    trace_map[[strat]] <- c(trace_map[[strat]], trace_count)
    
    }
  }

# ---- Dropdown ----

buttons <- list()

for (i in seq_along(kmVars_full)) {
  
  strat <- kmVars_full[i]
  
  vis <- rep(F, trace_count)
  vis[trace_map[[strat]]] <- T
  
  buttons[[i]] <- list(method = "update",
                       args   = list(list(visible = vis)),
                       label  = gsub("\\.", " ", strat))
  
  }

# ---- Plots ----

curvs <- curvs |>
  layout(xaxis = list(title  = "Employment wait time (weeks)",
                      range  = c(0, 54),
                      tick0  = 0,
                      dtick  = 6,
                      tickmode = "linear"),
         yaxis       = list(title = "Probability of unemployment",
                            range = c(0, 1)),
         legend      = list(orientation = "h",
                            x           = 0,
                            y           = 1.15,
                            xanchor     = "left",
                            yanchor     = "bottom"),
         margin      = list(l = 50,
                            r = 20,
                            t = 80,
                            b = 50),
         updatemenus = list(list(type    = "dropdown",
                                 buttons = buttons,
                                 x       = 1.0,
                                 xanchor = "right",
                                 y       = 1.15,
                                 yanchor = "top")),
         autosize    = T)

curvs
```

### Summary Statistics Based on Kaplan–Meier Estimation

```{r}

datatable(kmSummaryAlt,
          rownames = F,
          options  = list(pageLength = 10,
                          dom        = 'tip',
                          ordering   = T,
                          paging     = F,
                          scrollX    = T,
                          autoWidth  = F,
                          columnDefs = list(
                            list(className = 'dt-center',
                                 targets   = 1:(ncol(kmSummaryAlt)-1)),
                            list(width   = '180px',
                                 targets = "_all")
                          )),
          class    = 'compact stripe nowrap')

```



# Survival Method 2

Row {.tabset .tabset-fade}
-------------------------------------
    
### Cox Proportional Hazards Regression Model
    
```{r}

datatable(coxBestAlt,
          colnames = c("Term", "Estimate", "Hazard Ratio", "Test Statistic", "p-value"),
          rownames = F,
          options  = list(pageLength = 9,
                          dom        = 'tip',
                          ordering   = T,
                          paging     = F,
                          scrollX    = T,
                          autoWidth  = F,
                          columnDefs = list(
                            list(className = 'dt-center',
                                 targets   = 1:(ncol(coxBestAlt)-1)),
                            list(width   = '180px',
                                 targets = "_all")
                          )),
          class    = 'compact stripe nowrap')

colnames(coxBestAlt)

```

### Estimations
````{=html}
<div style="width: 100%; height: 100%; overflow-y: auto; box-sizing: border-box; padding: 12px;">
  <div style="max-width: 400px;">
    <div style="margin-bottom: 1rem;">
      <label>Age</label><br>
      <input type="number" id="est_age" value="22" min="15" max="27" style="width:100%;">
    </div>
    <div style="margin-bottom: 1rem;">
      <label>Sex</label><br>
      <select id="est_sex" style="width:100%;">
        <option value="0" selected>Male</option>
        <option value="1">Female</option>
      </select>
    </div>
    <div style="margin-bottom: 1rem;">
      <label>Undergraduate program</label><br>
      <select id="est_program" style="width:100%;">
        <option value="0" selected>BSB</option>
        <option value="1">BSES</option>
        <option value="2">BSFT</option>
        <option value="3">BSM AS</option>
        <option value="4">BSM BA</option>
        <option value="5">BSM CS</option>
      </select>
    </div>
    <div style="margin-bottom: 1rem;">
      <label>Graduation year</label><br>
      <input type="number" id="est_year" value="2022" min="2022" max="2032" style="width:100%;">
    </div>
    <div style="margin-bottom: 1rem;">
      <label>Professional exams</label><br>
      <input type="number" id="est_exam" value="0" min="0" max="3" style="width:100%;">
    </div>
    <button onclick="coxCalculate()" style="width:100%; padding: 8px;">Estimate</button>
    <div id="est_result" style="margin-top: 1rem; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.8; border: 1px solid #ccc; padding: 8px;"></div>
  </div>
</div>
<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
  window.coxCalculate = function() {
    var program = Number(document.getElementById('est_program').value); if (isNaN(program)) program = 0;
    var year    = Number(document.getElementById('est_year').value); if (isNaN(year)) year = 2022;
    var exam    = Number(document.getElementById('est_exam').value); if (isNaN(exam)) exam = 0;
    var age     = Number(document.getElementById('est_age').value); if (isNaN(age)) age = 22;
    var sex     = Number(document.getElementById('est_sex').value); if (isNaN(sex)) sex = 0;
    var logHaz = -0.25 * (age - 22)
               -0.26 * (sex === 1 ? 1 : 0)
               +0.34 * (program === 1 ? 1 : 0)
               +0.68 * (program === 2 ? 1 : 0)
               +0.25 * (program === 3 ? 1 : 0)
               +0.47 * (program === 4 ? 1 : 0)
               +0.09 * (program === 5 ? 1 : 0)
               -0.18 * (year - 2022)
               -0.20 * exam;
    var haz = Math.exp(logHaz);
    var interp = "";
    if (haz < 1) {
      interp = "Your odds of being employed at any given time is about " + haz.toFixed(3) + " times, " +
               "or roughly " + ((1 - haz) * 100).toFixed(1) + "% lower, " +
               "than that of the baseline individual, a 22-year-old male BS Biology graduate " +
               "who graduated in 2022 and did not take or pass any professional exams.";
    } else if (haz > 1) {
      interp = "Your odds of being employed at any given time is about " + haz.toFixed(3) + " times, " +
               "or roughly " + ((haz - 1) * 100).toFixed(1) + "% higher, " +
               "than that of the baseline individual, a 22-year-old male BS Biology graduate " +
               "who graduated in 2022 and did not take or pass any professional exams.";
    } else {
      interp = "Your odds of being employed at any given time is about the same as " +
               "that of the baseline individual, a 22-year-old male BS Biology graduate " +
               "who graduated in 2022 and did not take or pass any professional exams.";
    }
    document.getElementById('est_result').innerHTML =
      "<strong>Estimated hazard: " + haz.toFixed(3) + "</strong><br><br>" + interp;
  }
});
</script>
````

# Survival Method 3

Row {.tabset .tabset-fade}
-------------------------------------
    
### Accelerated Failure Time Model
    
```{r}

datatable(aftBestAlt,
          colnames = c("Term", "Estimate", "Standard Error", "Test Statistic", "p-value"),
          rownames = F,
          options  = list(pageLength = 11,
                          dom        = 'tip',
                          ordering   = T,
                          paging     = F,
                          scrollX    = T,
                          autoWidth  = F,
                          columnDefs = list(
                            list(className = 'dt-center',
                                 targets   = 1:(ncol(aftBestAlt)-1)),
                            list(width   = '180px',
                                 targets = "_all")
                          )),
          class    = 'compact stripe nowrap')

```

### Estimations

```{=html}
<div style="width: 100%; height: 100%; overflow-y: auto; box-sizing: border-box; padding: 12px;">
  <div style="max-width: 400px;">
    <div style="margin-bottom: 1rem;">
      <label>Age</label><br>
      <input type="number" id="esti_age" value="22" min="15" max="27" style="width:100%;">
    </div>
    <div style="margin-bottom: 1rem;">
      <label>Sex</label><br>
      <select id="esti_sex" style="width:100%;">
        <option value="0" selected>Male</option>
        <option value="1">Female</option>
      </select>
    </div>
    <div style="margin-bottom: 1rem;">
      <label>Undergraduate program</label><br>
      <select id="esti_program" style="width:100%;">
        <option value="0" selected>BSB</option>
        <option value="1">BSES</option>
        <option value="2">BSFT</option>
        <option value="3">BSM AS</option>
        <option value="4">BSM BA</option>
        <option value="5">BSM CS</option>
      </select>
    </div>
    <div style="margin-bottom: 1rem;">
      <label>Graduation year</label><br>
      <input type="number" id="esti_year" value="2022" min="2022" max="2032" style="width:100%;">
    </div>
    <div style="margin-bottom: 1rem;">
      <label>Professional exams</label><br>
      <input type="number" id="esti_exam" value="0" min="0" max="3" style="width:100%;">
    </div>
    <button onclick="aftCalculate()" style="width:100%; padding: 8px;">Estimate</button>
    <div id="esti_result" style="margin-top: 1rem; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.8; border: 1px solid #ccc; padding: 8px;"></div>
  </div>
</div>
<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
  window.aftCalculate = function() {
    var program = Number(document.getElementById('esti_program').value); if (isNaN(program)) program = 0;
    var year    = Number(document.getElementById('esti_year').value); if (isNaN(year)) year = 2022;
    var exam    = Number(document.getElementById('esti_exam').value); if (isNaN(exam)) exam = 0;
    var age     = Number(document.getElementById('esti_age').value); if (isNaN(age)) age = 22;
    var sex     = Number(document.getElementById('esti_sex').value); if (isNaN(sex)) sex = 0;
    var logTime = 1.86
               +0.35 * (age - 22)
               +0.35 * (sex === 1 ? 1 : 0)
               -0.48 * (program === 1 ? 1 : 0)
               -0.90 * (program === 2 ? 1 : 0)
               -0.33 * (program === 3 ? 1 : 0)
               -0.68 * (program === 4 ? 1 : 0)
               -0.12 * (program === 5 ? 1 : 0)
               +0.21 * (year - 2022)
               +0.27 * exam;
    var time = Math.exp(logTime);
    document.getElementById('esti_result').innerHTML =
      "<strong>Estimated employment wait time: " + time.toFixed(2) + " weeks</strong>";
  }
});
</script>
```

# Survival Method 4

Row {.tabset .tabset-fade}
-------------------------------------
    
###  Royston--Parmar Splines Model
    
```{r}

datatable(rpsBestAlt,
          colnames = c("Term", "Estimate", "Standard Error", "Test Statistic", "p-value"),
          rownames = F,
          options  = list(pageLength = 11,
                          dom        = 'tip',
                          ordering   = T,
                          paging     = F,
                          scrollX    = T,
                          autoWidth  = F,
                          columnDefs = list(
                            list(className = 'dt-center',
                                 targets   = 1:(ncol(rpsBestAlt)-1)),
                            list(width   = '180px',
                                 targets = "_all")
                          )),
          class    = 'compact stripe nowrap')

```

### Estimations

```{=html}
<div style="width: 100%; height: 100%; overflow-y: auto; box-sizing: border-box; padding: 12px;">
  <div style="max-width: 420px;">

    <div style="margin-bottom: 1rem;">
      <label>Age</label><br>
      <input type="number" id="rps_age" value="22" min="15" max="27" style="width:100%;">
    </div>

    <div style="margin-bottom: 1rem;">
      <label>Sex</label><br>
      <select id="rps_sex" style="width:100%;">
        <option value="0" selected>Male</option>
        <option value="1">Female</option>
      </select>
    </div>

    <div style="margin-bottom: 1rem;">
      <label>Undergraduate program</label><br>
      <select id="rps_program" style="width:100%;">
        <option value="0" selected>BSB</option>
        <option value="1">BSES</option>
        <option value="2">BSFT</option>
        <option value="3">BSM AS</option>
        <option value="4">BSM BA</option>
        <option value="5">BSM CS</option>
      </select>
    </div>

    <div style="margin-bottom: 1rem;">
      <label>Graduation year</label><br>
      <input type="number" id="rps_year" value="2022" min="2022" max="2032" style="width:100%;">
    </div>

    <div style="margin-bottom: 1rem;">
      <label>Professional exams passed</label><br>
      <input type="number" id="rps_exam" value="0" min="0" max="3" style="width:100%;">
    </div>

    <button onclick="rpsCalculate()" style="width:100%; padding: 8px;">Estimate</button>

    <div id="rps_result" style="margin-top: 1rem; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.8; border: 1px solid #ccc; padding: 8px; display:none;"></div>

    <canvas id="rps_chart" style="margin-top: 1rem; width:100%; display:none;"></canvas>

  </div>
</div>

<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {

  const TAU   = 16;
  const BK    = [-2.302585, 4.942356];
  const QC    = [0.2672612, 0.5345225, 0.8017837];
  const QDOTQ = QC.reduce((s, v) => s + v * v, 0);

  const COEF = {
    intercept : -3.09995804,
    age       : -0.25866410,
    sexFemale : -0.26273827,
    bses      :  0.35931880,
    bsft      :  0.66959981,
    bsmAs     :  0.24419759,
    bsmBa     :  0.50471154,
    bsmCs     :  0.08731554,
    gradYear  : -0.15994150,
    exams     : -0.20094185,
    nsx       :  6.67785531
  };

  function nsxVal(logT) {
    const u   = (logT - BK[0]) / (BK[1] - BK[0]);
    const bs3 = [3*u*(1-u)**2, 3*u**2*(1-u), u**3];
    return bs3.reduce((s, v, i) => s + v * QC[i], 0) / QDOTQ;
  }

  function covLP(age, sex, program, year, exams) {
    return COEF.age       * (age - 22)
         + COEF.sexFemale * sex
         + COEF.bses      * (program === 1 ? 1 : 0)
         + COEF.bsft      * (program === 2 ? 1 : 0)
         + COEF.bsmAs     * (program === 3 ? 1 : 0)
         + COEF.bsmBa     * (program === 4 ? 1 : 0)
         + COEF.bsmCs     * (program === 5 ? 1 : 0)
         + COEF.gradYear  * (year - 2022)
         + COEF.exams     * exams;
  }

  function survival(t, lp0) {
    const lp = COEF.intercept + lp0 + COEF.nsx * nsxVal(Math.log(t));
    return Math.exp(-Math.exp(lp));
  }

  function rmst(lp0, steps = 1000) {
    const dt = (16 - 0.1) / steps;
    let area = 0;
    for (let i = 0; i < steps; i++) {
      const t0 = 0.1 + i * dt;
      const t1 = 0.1 + (i + 1) * dt;
      area += 0.5 * (survival(t0, lp0) + survival(t1, lp0)) * dt;
    }
    return area;
  }

  function survivalCurve(lp0, points = 200) {
    const ts = [], ss = [];
    for (let i = 1; i <= points; i++) {
      const t = 0.1 + ((16 - 0.1) / points) * i;
      ts.push(t);
      ss.push(survival(t, lp0));
    }
    return { ts, ss };
  }

  function drawChart(ts, ss) {
    const canvas = document.getElementById('rps_chart');
    canvas.style.display = 'block';
    canvas.width  = canvas.offsetWidth || 380;
    canvas.height = 220;
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

    const pad = { top: 20, right: 20, bottom: 40, left: 45 };
    const W = canvas.width  - pad.left - pad.right;
    const H = canvas.height - pad.top  - pad.bottom;

    const xScale = t => pad.left + (t / TAU) * W;
    const yScale = s => pad.top  + (1 - s) * H;

    // RMST shaded area
    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(100, 160, 220, 0.2)';
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(xScale(0), yScale(0));
    ts.forEach((t, i) => ctx.lineTo(xScale(t), yScale(ss[i])));
    ctx.lineTo(xScale(TAU), yScale(0));
    ctx.lineTo(xScale(0),   yScale(0));
    ctx.fill();

    // axes
    ctx.strokeStyle = '#888';
    ctx.lineWidth = 1;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(pad.left, pad.top);
    ctx.lineTo(pad.left, pad.top + H);
    ctx.lineTo(pad.left + W, pad.top + H);
    ctx.stroke();

    // y gridlines + labels
    ctx.fillStyle = '#555';
    ctx.font = '11px sans-serif';
    ctx.textAlign = 'right';
    [0, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 1].forEach(v => {
      const y = yScale(v);
      ctx.fillText(v.toFixed(2), pad.left - 5, y + 4);
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#eee';
      ctx.lineWidth = 1;
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.moveTo(pad.left, y);
      ctx.lineTo(pad.left + W, y);
      ctx.stroke();
    });

    // x labels
    ctx.textAlign = 'center';
    ctx.fillStyle = '#555';
    [0, 4, 8, 12, 16].forEach(t => {
      ctx.fillText(t, xScale(t), pad.top + H + 16);
    });

    // axis labels
    ctx.save();
    ctx.translate(12, pad.top + H / 2);
    ctx.rotate(-Math.PI / 2);
    ctx.textAlign = 'center';
    ctx.fillText('Survival probability', 0, 0);
    ctx.restore();
    ctx.textAlign = 'center';
    ctx.fillText('Weeks since graduation', pad.left + W / 2, canvas.height - 4);

    // survival curve
    ctx.strokeStyle = '#2a6ebb';
    ctx.lineWidth = 2.5;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ts.forEach((t, i) => {
      if (i === 0) ctx.moveTo(xScale(t), yScale(ss[i]));
      else         ctx.lineTo(xScale(t), yScale(ss[i]));
    });
    ctx.stroke();
  }

  window.rpsCalculate = function () {
    var age     = Number(document.getElementById('rps_age').value);     if (isNaN(age))     age     = 22;
    var sex     = Number(document.getElementById('rps_sex').value);     if (isNaN(sex))     sex     = 0;
    var program = Number(document.getElementById('rps_program').value); if (isNaN(program)) program = 0;
    var year    = Number(document.getElementById('rps_year').value);    if (isNaN(year))    year    = 2022;
    var exam    = Number(document.getElementById('rps_exam').value);    if (isNaN(exam))    exam    = 0;

    const lp0     = covLP(age, sex, program, year, exam);
    const rmstVal = rmst(lp0);
    const s16     = survival(16, lp0);
    const { ts, ss } = survivalCurve(lp0);

    const resultDiv = document.getElementById('rps_result');
    resultDiv.style.display = 'block';
    resultDiv.innerHTML =
      "<strong>Estimated employment wait time: " + rmstVal.toFixed(2) + " weeks</strong><br><br>" +
      "Estimated probability of not yet being employed by week 16: " + (s16 * 100).toFixed(1) + "%";

    drawChart(ts, ss);
  };

});
</script>
```

# Decision Tree 1

### Decision Tree on Job Relevance via Classification and Regression Trees (CART) Algorithm

```{r}
knitr::include_graphics("Figures\\Relevance CART.png")
```

# Decision Tree 2

### Decision Tree on Job Relevance via C5.0 Algorithm

```{r}
knitr::include_graphics("Figures\\Relevance C5.0.png")
```
